item.title: ‘We Want to Travel.’ My Wife and I Just Turned 40 With $1 Million Saved. Are We Crazy to Pause Our Retirement Contributions?
item.description: This is not a bad problem to have, but it does require some self-evaluation.

item.title: Gold Prices Today: February 20, 2026
item.description: Today’s gold prices see the precious metal move down from yesterday. Here are today’s gold futures prices and a quick snapshot of where gold was yeste...

item.title: Why So Many Americans Don’t Feel Prepared for Retirement
item.description: Rising costs and Social Security fears are shaking Americans’ retirement confidence.

item.title: 4 Easy Ways to Turn Costco Trips Into Monthly Savings
item.description: Don't underestimate the deals on gift cards, gas and more.

item.title: Your 2026 Social Security Playbook: 5 Moves to Make Before Filing
item.description: Start with checking your earnings statement and coordinating with your spouse.
